stemHtml:
An aircraft maintains a constant indicated altitude of 7 500 ft from A (270 ft AMSL - QNH 1021 hPa) to B (1 650 ft AMSL - QNH 983 hPa).Assuming that the altimeter sub-scale setting remains unchanged at 1021 hPa, the height of the aircraft above the surface at B are:
(Barometric lapse rate: 27 ft/hPa)
